name: html-presentation-editor
description: Local HTML presentation editor with Playwright regression coverage.

scripts.test:pilot: npm run test:gate-a && npm run test:asset-parity
scripts.test:gate-b: playwright test tests/playwright/specs/shell.smoke.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/click-through.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/selection-engine-v2.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/layer-navigation.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/overlap-recovery.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/stage-o-layers-lock-group.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/editor.regression.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/asset-parity.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/honest-feedback.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/visual.spec.js tests/playwright/selection-perf.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop && playwright test tests/playwright/specs/shell.smoke.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/editor.regression.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/asset-parity.spec.js tests/playwright/specs/visual.spec.js --project=chromium-shell-1100
scripts.test:gate-a11y: PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_SERVER_PORT=41735 npx playwright test tests/a11y/ --project=chromium-desktop --config playwright.a11y.config.js

author: Codex hardening workflow
